feed.title: Builder Season Playbook - Progress Log
feed.subtitle: A log of my progress building this hackathon project template

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
I registered for the hackathon today and created the repo and made an annoucement post on X

Cool day ... and I got my progress log working ... I think.

It works but I still need to clean up some stuff. Cheers!

todo:

  • make blog-menu work in the most simple way - change to npm
  • make npm scripts to acces the blog / logging
